overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character with distinctive white hair and blue vest walking through a stone corridor into a gothic-style dormitory room with blue decor. The character approaches a mirror, studies their reflection, then turns to explore the room containing bunk beds and wooden furnishings.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a narrow stone corridor toward an arched doorway at the end

entered.detail: rough gray stone blocks forming the left wall of the corridor
rough gray stone blocks forming the right wall of the corridor
dark wooden paneling on the lower half of the right wall
gothic arched doorway with a closed wooden door at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow, dimly lit stone corridor with wooden wainscoting on the right wall, approaching a closed arched doorway at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dormitory room with blue decor

events.description: character opens the door and enters the dormitory room from the corridor

agents.ego_description: opening the door and walking into the room, heading toward a large mirror on the right wall

entered.detail: wooden bunk beds with heavy blue curtains and drapes
white-framed oval mirror mounted on the stone wall
wooden desk with stacked books and papers beneath the mirror
tall gothic arched window with diamond leaded panes behind the bunk beds
blue carpet covering the wooden floor of the room

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious gothic dormitory room with blue decor, natural light streaming through an arched window behind wooden bunk beds, and approaches a large oval mirror on the right wall.

events.description: character stops walking and stands still to look at their reflection

agents.ego_description: standing motionless in front of the mirror studying their reflection

segments.scene_description: The character stands still before the mirror, examining their reflection while the camera focuses on the oval mirror and the blue-draped bunk beds visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dormitory room near wardrobes and beds

events.description: character turns away from the mirror and begins walking around the room

agents.ego_description: turning away from the mirror and walking around the room to examine the wooden wardrobes and bunk beds

entered.detail: tall dark wooden wardrobes with vertical paneling and metal handles
wooden coat rack with hanging garments near the entrance door
upholstered armchair with wooden frame near the window
wooden ladder attached to the bunk beds

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the mirror and explores the room, revealing dark wooden wardrobes, a coat rack, and moving toward the bunk beds with blue curtains near the arched window.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed stone corridor into a bright, gothic dormitory room. It begins by trailing the character down a narrow hallway with wooden wainscoting toward a closed arched doorway. As the character passes through the threshold, the scene opens into a spacious room filled with natural light streaming through an arched window and blue decor. The camera then slows as the character pauses before a large oval mirror to examine their reflection, with blue-draped bunk beds visible in the background. Finally, the perspective shifts as the character turns away to explore the rest of the space, moving past dark wooden wardrobes and a coat rack toward the curtains of the bunk beds.
